situational_context: Running comeback day 55 (12 runs since May 3). Run #12 overreach on Jun 21 (7.5 km vs 4 km planned, suffer 36) triggered extended recovery — 6 rest days since Jun 23 (only ebike commutes). HRV persistently depressed: 7 consecutive UNBALANCED/LOW days, weekly avg 33 ms (down from 36 two weeks ago, 17% below May baseline of 39-40). Pattern echoes the failed March 2025 comeback — erratic distance compliance is the primary behavioral risk. ACWR 1.21 (last computed Jun 23). Currently at Hotel Mercure Chantilly for weekend stay (Jun 26-29) — forest training environment available. Canicule breaking: 37C today to 27C Sunday, 23C by Monday. Weight 103.67 kg (Jun 21), fat ratio improving (26.3% vs 26.8%), muscle mass up +1.16 kg — body recomposition underway. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest overdue. Body battery chronically low (<50), likely baby-related sleep fragmentation contribution.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Run #13 — 4 km Z2 strict (Foret de Chantilly)

recommendations.text: DISTANCE COMPLIANCE IS THE #1 RISK. Run #12 (7.5 km vs 4 km planned) exactly mirrors the pattern that derailed the March 2025 comeback. For Run #13 (Sun) and Run #14 (Wed): set Garmin distance alert at 4.0 km, WALK home after alert. No negotiation.

HRV weekly avg at 33 ms (down from 36 two weeks ago, 17% below May baseline). Seven consecutive UNBALANCED/LOW days. Body battery chronically <50. Prioritize 7.5+ hours sleep, hydrate aggressively. If HRV weekly avg drops to <=30, skip all running until recovery.
recommendations.measurable: HRV weekly avg >= 35 within 7 days; body battery reaching >= 50 at least 2/7 days

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest NOW overdue (was due ~July 2026). At 103+ kg with active running, insufficient Vitamin D (27 ng/mL in Dec 2025) doubles stress fracture risk. Schedule blood panel this week.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if drops to <= 30 ms or fails to recover toward >= 35 within 7 days
